rich_text.plain_text: "You counted 8 Red Minis, 10 Blue Minis, and 6 Yellow Minis. That's your data. Let's make a picture graph with it."

text.content: Animation workspace appears showing picture graph structure ready for transformation.

text.content: "Here are the 8 Red Minis. Watch what happens..."

rich_text.plain_text: "Here are the 8 Red Minis. Watch what happens..."

text.content: 8 Red Minis items appear in animation workspace

rich_text.plain_text: 8 Red Minis items appear in animation workspace

text.content: "8 items... watch them pair up into groups of 2..."

rich_text.plain_text: "8 items... watch them pair up into groups of 2..."

text.content: 8 Red Minis visually pair up: 2, 2, 2, 2. Four groups of 2 visible.

rich_text.plain_text: 8 Red Minis visually pair up: 2, 2, 2, 2. Four groups of 2 visible.

text.content: "Each group of 2 becomes ONE symbol."

rich_text.plain_text: "Each group of 2 becomes ONE symbol."

text.content: Each pair transforms into one symbol. 4 symbols now appear on the graph row for Red Minis.

rich_text.plain_text: Each pair transforms into one symbol. 4 symbols now appear on the graph row for Red Minis.

text.content: "4 groups... 4 symbols."

rich_text.plain_text: "4 groups... 4 symbols."

text.content: Key appears on graph: 'Each ⭐ = 2'

rich_text.plain_text: Key appears on graph: 'Each ⭐ = 2'

text.content: "Each symbol shows 2 items, not 1. That's different from before!"

rich_text.plain_text: "Each symbol shows 2 items, not 1. That's different from before!"

text.content: "Let's transform the Blue Minis into symbols. 10 items... 5 groups of 2... 5 symbols."

rich_text.plain_text: "Let's transform the Blue Minis into symbols. 10 items... 5 groups of 2... 5 symbols."

text.content: Blue Minis category transforms: 10 items group into 5 pairs, become 5 symbols.

rich_text.plain_text: Blue Minis category transforms: 10 items group into 5 pairs, become 5 symbols.

text.content: "Now the Yellow Minis into symbols representing 2 each. 6 items... 3 groups of 2... 3 symbols."

rich_text.plain_text: "Now the Yellow Minis into symbols representing 2 each. 6 items... 3 groups of 2... 3 symbols."

text.content: Yellow Minis category transforms: 6 items group into 3 pairs, become 3 symbols.

rich_text.plain_text: Yellow Minis category transforms: 6 items group into 3 pairs, become 3 symbols.
